creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
dougb       2011-03-27 19:03:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/dirmngr     Makefile 
    security/gnupg       Makefile 
    security/libksba     Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    security/pinentry    Makefile 
  Log:
  Update libksba to 1.2.0, and update dependent ports.
  The patch also adds a verify target for the PGP signature
  of the distfile.
  
  Noteworthy changes in version 1.2.0 (2011-03-01)
  ------------------------------------------------
  
  * New functions to allow the creation of X.509 certificates.
  
  This release adds features required by the GnuPG 2.1 development
  version.
  
  PR:             ports/155506
  Submitted by:   me
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.51      +2 -2      ports/security/dirmngr/Makefile
  1.138     +3 -2      ports/security/gnupg/Makefile
  1.49      +7 -2      ports/security/libksba/Makefile
  1.23      +4 -2      ports/security/libksba/distinfo
  1.12      +1 -1      ports/security/libksba/pkg-plist
  1.59      +1 -1      ports/security/pinentry/Makefile
